Kenmare is involved in significant projects: $18M Dakota Tipi development at The Forks (145-unit, traditional Dakota lands) — major Indigenous-led project with reconciliation framing. Engagement angle: lead with respect for the partnership work + Ashrah's structured painter training (workforce reliability matters when your projects are politically visible).
